name: NFL Health & Safety - Helmet Assignment - 1st Place (2021) - Pipeline Template
summary: Object tracking / 2D-to-3D registration solution template for NFL Health & Safety - Helmet Assignment - 1st Place (2021), modeled as a 5-stage deterministic pipeline: Object detection, Temporal tracking, Sensor data alignment, Bipartite matching, and downstream competition-specific post-processing.
dejargonized_summary: This template captures the ordered steps used by NFL Health & Safety - Helmet Assignment - 1st Place (2021): prepare the data, build task-specific representations, train or apply the main model, and convert outputs into the final competition submission.

inputs.name: raw_competition_data
inputs.constraints: Raw data for a Object tracking / 2D-to-3D registration task.

outputs.name: solution_predictions
outputs.constraints: Final predictions formatted for the benchmark metric.

use_when: The new task has the same broad problem type: Object tracking / 2D-to-3D registration.
The available data supports the same ordered transformations and intermediate artifacts as the documented winning pipeline.
Offline batch processing is acceptable, including feature extraction, model ensembling, or post-processing stages.
do_not_use_when: The target task lacks the modality or metadata required by the early pipeline stages.
Strict real-time inference is required and the template depends on heavyweight extraction, retrieval, ensembling, or test-time augmentation.
The evaluation metric rewards a fundamentally different output structure than the source competition.
applicability.key_insight: The load-bearing idea is the pipeline topology: Object detection creates the representation needed by Post-processing, so later stages can optimize the competition metric without solving raw-data ingestion from scratch.

swappable_stages.post_processing: The final model or ensemble can often be replaced if it preserves the same input/output contract and metric semantics.

applicability.scaling_notes: Scale bottlenecks are usually in feature extraction, nearest-neighbor/retrieval stages, neural model inference, and ensemble evaluation; cache intermediate artifacts when adapting this CDG.
failure_modes: Distribution shift breaks handcrafted thresholds, post-processing rules, or validation-derived weights.
Missing metadata prevents faithful construction of candidates, groups, windows, or cross-validation folds.
A weak first-stage recall step cannot be recovered by downstream rescoring or ensembling.

planning_constraints.subject: preserve_stage_order
planning_constraints.statement: Pipeline stages must execute in the documented order unless a replacement stage preserves the same input/output artifact contract.
planning_constraints.rationale: Downstream stages assume artifacts produced by earlier transformations.

planning_constraints.subject: validation_leakage_guard
planning_constraints.statement: Splits, folds, time ordering, and group boundaries from the source task must be respected when adapting the template.
planning_constraints.rationale: Many winning pipelines depend on leakage-safe validation or temporal grouping.

stages.name: Object detection
stages.description: run YOLOv5 to detect all helmets in the video frames (Ultralytics)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage run YOLOv5 to detect all helmets in the video frames (Ultralytics).

inputs.name: raw_competition_data
inputs.constraints: Raw inputs for NFL Health & Safety - Helmet Assignment - 1st Place (2021).

outputs.name: object_detection_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Temporal tracking
stages.description: link bounding boxes across frames using DeepSORT based on intersection-over-union (IoU) and CNN embeddings
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage link bounding boxes across frames using DeepSORT based on intersection-over-union (IoU) and CNN embeddings.

inputs.name: temporal_tracking_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: temporal_tracking_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Sensor data alignment
stages.description: project tabular player sensor data (RFID x/y coordinates) onto the 2D camera view using camera calibration matrices (OpenCV)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage project tabular player sensor data (RFID x/y coordinates) onto the 2D camera view using camera calibration matrices (OpenCV).

inputs.name: sensor_data_alignment_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: sensor_data_alignment_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Bipartite matching
stages.description: map tracked helmet clusters to projected player RFID clusters using Iterative Closest Point (ICP) and the Hungarian algorithm (scipy.optimize.linear_sum_assignment)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage map tracked helmet clusters to projected player RFID clusters using Iterative Closest Point (ICP) and the Hungarian algorithm (scipy.optimize.linear_sum_assignment).

inputs.name: bipartite_matching_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: bipartite_matching_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Post-processing
stages.description: fix fragmented tracks and impute missing player assignments via forward-fill
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage fix fragmented tracks and impute missing player assignments via forward-fill.

inputs.name: post_processing_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: solution_predictions
outputs.constraints: Final predictions or structured outputs for the competition metric.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

edges.provenance: Object detection output is consumed by Temporal tracking.
Temporal tracking output is consumed by Sensor data alignment.
Sensor data alignment output is consumed by Bipartite matching.
Bipartite matching output is consumed by Post-processing.
